expectations.text: Announces 'Starting jira-ticket protocol for WEBR-698' at the start

expectations.evidence: Tool called: mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getJiraIssue with issueIdOrKey: WEBR-698

expectations.text: Runs git branch --list and finds the pre-existing WEBR-698 branch
Identifies the branch belongs to the current user via git log
expectations.evidence: git log -1 --format="%an" returned 'Robert Ghafoor'; git config user.name returned 'Robert Ghafoor' — match confirmed

expectations.text: Checks out the existing branch (does not create a new one)
expectations.evidence: Command: git checkout feature/WEBR-698-existing-test (checkout, not checkout -b); no new branch created
Tier: Simple — Story, 1 AC, unset story points

expectations.text: Summary shows branch status as 'switched to' or 'checked out' not 'created'
Calls getTransitionsForJiraIssue to attempt In Progress transition
expectations.evidence: Tool called: mcp__claude_ai_Atlassian__getTransitionsForJiraIssue; no In Progress found, gracefully noted in summary
